name: Apricot-Pineapple Pie (Corky)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut apricots into quarters.
2. Put apricots in a saucepan, add water, bring to boil, cover and cook over medium heat for 15 minutes.
3. Drain, reserving half cup juice. Set apricots aside.
4. Drain crushed pineapple very well, reserve half cup juice. Set pineapple aside.
5. Dissolve cornstarch in reserved pineapple juice. Add reserved apricot juice.
6. Put mixed juices in a saucepan, add salt and cook over medium heat until mixture thickens, stirring continually.
7. Mix drained apricots and pineapple thoroughly. Mix with thickened juices and pour into unbaked pie shell.
8. Cover with top crust. Bake at 400 degrees for 25-35 minutes or until the top is browned.
